response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed geospatial pipelines — key requirements for this role. His DLang and Node.js work shows systems-level aptitude, but the absence of modern C++ in commercial routing contexts and limited evidence of distributed systems for map tile processing raises significant gaps.
strengths: Proven geospatial experience via open-source GISCollective platform
Strong systems-level programming background with DLang and low-latency systems
Demonstrated ability to learn and contribute across diverse technical stacks
concerns: No demonstrated commercial experience with C++ or Rust in routing or navigation contexts
Lacks explicit experience with routing tile generation, map data pipelines, or real-time traffic integration
Minimal evidence of distributed systems work focused on fault tolerance or consistency at scale for geospatial data
